instruction: Open Mail and create a draft message with the subject {SUBJECT}.
source: cove-original (design 047 §5 Tier-C Apple Events). Reads draft subjects via AppleScript; no-op creates nothing so the check scores 0.

args: osascript -e 'tell application "Mail" to make new outgoing message with properties {subject:"{SUBJECT}", visible:true}' 2>/dev/null || true

result.script: tell application "Mail" to get subject of every outgoing message as string
